subject: Morning Brew - Tech Giants Report Earnings
content:
MARKETS

Stock futures are pointing higher this morning after a strong earnings season kickoff. The S&P 500 is up 0.8% in premarket trading.

Read more

Big Tech Earnings Bonanza

Apple, Microsoft, and Google parent Alphabet all reported earnings yesterday, and the results were... pretty darn good. Apple beat expectations with $124 billion in revenue, driven by strong iPhone sales in emerging markets. Microsoft's cloud division Azure grew 29% year-over-year.

Full story

AI Startup Raises $500M

Anthropic competitor OpenMind has raised $500 million in a Series C round led by Sequoia Capital. The startup is building AI agents for enterprise customers and claims to have 200 paying customers.

Read more

Fed Signals Rate Decision

Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell hinted that interest rates could remain steady at the next FOMC meeting, citing cooling inflation data. Markets are pricing in a 78% chance of no change.

Full coverage

subject: Axios AM: The tech earnings surprise
content:
1 big thing: Tech earnings crush expectations

Why it matters: The biggest tech companies just showed Wall Street they're still growing despite economic headwinds. Apple's iPhone revenue exceeded analyst estimates by $3 billion.

Go deeper

What's happening in AI

The AI arms race is heating up. Google announced a new version of Gemini that outperforms GPT-4 on several benchmarks. Meanwhile, Meta is reportedly working on a new AI model called Llama 4.

Read more

Climate: Record temperatures continue

2025 is on track to be the hottest year on record, with global temperatures 1.5°C above pre-industrial levels. Scientists warn that extreme weather events will become more frequent.

Full story

Politics: Senate debates new AI bill

The Senate is considering the AI Safety and Innovation Act, which would require companies to register large AI models with the government. Tech lobbyists are pushing back hard.

More

subject: The Hustle: Why VCs are going crazy for AI agents
content:
The AI Agent Gold Rush

Venture capitalists have poured $12 billion into AI agent startups in the past 6 months alone. Why? Because agents that can actually DO things (not just chat) are the next big opportunity. Companies like Anthropic, with their Claude AI, are leading the charge.

Read the full breakdown

Apple's Secret AR Project

Sources say Apple is working on lightweight AR glasses that could launch in 2027. The device reportedly weighs less than 100 grams and has a 4-hour battery life. This could be bigger than the iPhone.

More details

The Remote Work Debate Is Over

After years of back-and-forth, data shows that hybrid work is here to stay. 67% of companies now offer flexible work arrangements, up from 42% in 2023. Full remote is declining, but the office-only era is dead.

See the data

subject: Snacks Daily: Apple hits $4 trillion
content:
Apple becomes first $4 trillion company

Apple just hit a market cap of $4 trillion, making it the most valuable company in history. The milestone comes after blockbuster earnings that showed iPhone sales surging 15% in China. Tim Cook called it 'a testament to Apple's innovation.'

Trade AAPL

Bitcoin breaks $100K again

Bitcoin crossed the $100,000 mark for the second time this year, driven by institutional buying and anticipation of a Bitcoin ETF approval in Europe. Ethereum is also up 8% this week.

See crypto prices

What to watch today

Earnings after the bell: Netflix, Tesla, and AMD. All three are expected to report strong numbers. Netflix subscriber growth and Tesla's vehicle deliveries will be the key metrics to watch.

Earnings calendar
